_comment: Curated free, no-API-key MCP servers bundled with MuhGPT (pentest recon / OSINT / deep search). Loaded automatically when MCP is enabled (--mcp / MUHGPT_MCP_ENABLED), unless --no-mcp-defaults / MUHGPT_MCP_DEFAULTS=0. The operator's --mcp-config is merged on top and overrides same-named servers. All require Node/npx; versions are pinned. All tools are read-only and route through the guard (CONFIRM by default).
